subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again! I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Next week works well — please send over a couple of time slots that suit you and we'll confirm something for a 30-minute call.

On sharing direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering: I'm not able to provide internal contact information externally. If a senior-level technical conversation makes sense as things progress, we can facilitate an introduction through the right channels at that stage.

Thanks, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
